channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Founder mode can’t work. Be maximalist
item.description: The tech industry was recently abuzz with a post from Y Combinator founder Paul Graham on “founder mode.
item.dc:creator: Bipul Sinha, Fast Company

item.title: This Mark Cuban-backed startup is helping creators monetize their audiences
item.description: Falon Fatemi first met Mark Cuban in 2011 at South By Southwest, where the two bonded over ideas about untapped opportunities in the tech industry.
item.dc:creator: Janya Sundar, Fast Company

item.title: Eddie AI is one of the best video editing tools out there
item.description: This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps. Subscribe here.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: How to Factory Reset Your Android Phone: A Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: A step-by-step guide on how to factory reset your Android phone, including tips and precautions for a successful reset.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texting and chat apps aren’t always secure. Use these encrypted platforms instead
item.description: After a sprawling hacking campaign exposed the communications of an unknown number of Americans, U.S. cybersecurity officials are advising people to use encryption in their communications.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Apple CEO visits Mar-a-Lago, joining list of tech execs seemingly courting Trump
item.description: Apple CEO Tim Cook visited Mar-a-Lago on Friday, joining a growing list of tech executives that are seemingly courting President-elect Trump ahead of his return to the White House. The president-elect and Cook had dinner at Trump's Florida resort in West Palm Beach, multiple outlets reported.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Lawmakers tell Apple, Google to prepare for TikTok ban
item.description: TikTok now plans to appeal to the Supreme Court and has asked the D.C. Circuit to put the law on hold while it appeals the case.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, NewsNation

item.title: Court denies TikTok's request to halt enforcement of potential US ban until Supreme Court review
item.description: A federal appeals court has left in place a mid-January deadline in a federal law requiring TikTok to be sold or face a ban in the United States.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Meta wants Threads to be more like Bluesky. Again
item.description: The surest sign a social media platform is winning: when Meta starts cribbing notes from it. Stories only arrived on Instagram in 2016 after Snapchat proved the ephemeral concept had some heat.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: For December’s Patch Tuesday, 74 updates and a zero-day fix for Windows
item.description: Microsoft released 74 updates in its December Patch Tuesday update, with patches for Windows, Office and Edge — but none for Microsoft Exchange Server or SQL server.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Sophia, a famous robot and global icon of AI, wins hearts at Zimbabwe's innovation fair
item.description: HARARE, Zimbabwe (AP) — From answering questions from Cabinet ministers, academics and students on climate change, substance abuse and the law to children’s inquiries about her “birth” and links to God and being described as a talkative feminist, Sophia, the world-famous robot won hearts at an innov
item.dc:creator: BY FARAI MUTSAKA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Metaphor: ReFantazio, Dragon Age, Astro Bot and an indie wave lead the top AP video games of 2024
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — It’s been a rough year in the world of video games, which reeled from some high-profile flops (sorry, Suicide Squad and Star Wars fans) and a relentless series of developer layoffs. Fortunately, indie designers stepped up to fill in the gaps.
item.dc:creator: LOU KESTEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Musk knocks SEC over settlement offer in probe
item.description: Tech mogul Elon Musk criticized the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on Thursday over a settlement offer in the agency’s probe into his 2022 purchase of Twitter, the social platform now known as X.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: The Python AI library hack that didn’t hack Python
item.description: Guess what’s both one of the fastest-growing and most popular languages of 2024? (Hint: It’s not Java.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump offers support for dockworkers union by saying ports shouldn’t install more automated systems
item.description: The International Longshoremen’s Association has until Jan. 15 to negotiate a new contract with the U.S. Maritime Alliance, which represents ports and shipping companies.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: DoorDash steps up driver ID checks after traffic safety complaints
item.description: DoorDash will require its drivers to verify their identities more often as part of a larger effort to crack down on unauthorized account sharing. DoorDash has been under pressure to ensure its drivers are operating legally.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: How to factory reset your iPhone
item.description: Factory resetting an iPhone is a crucial step to protect your privacy and prevent theft when you are selling, trading or donating your device.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google unveils Gemini 2.0 AI model for agentic era
item.description: Emphasizing a new AI model for the agentic era, Google has introduced Gemini 2.0, which the company calls its most capable model yet. Announced December 11, the Gemini 2.0 Flash experimental model will be available to all Gemini users.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Apple Intelligence arrives for the UK, Australia, Canada, New Zealand with iOS 18.2
item.description: Apple has released iOS 18.2, iPadOS 18.2, and macOS Sequoia 15.2, which means local language access to Apple Intelligence is now available to iPhone, Mac, and iPad users in the UK, Australia, Canada, New Zealand.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: AI in the workplace is forcing younger tech workers to rethink their career paths
item.description: Entry-level workers increasingly fear job loss or significant changes to their careers due to automation made possible by generative AI (genAI).
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 3 takeaways from the Ultralytics AI Python library hack
item.description: When attackers compromised Ultralytics YOLO, a popular real-time object detection machine-learning package for Python, most assumed the Python Package Index, or PyPI, must be the point of failure. That made sense because the tampered software artifact was first found on PyPI.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Networking terms and definitions
item.description: To find a brief definition of the networking term you are looking for user your browser’s “Find” feature then follow links to a fuller explanation. AI networking AI networking refers to the application of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to network management and optimization.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Boosting Cyprus' defense is key so close to the war-wracked Mideast, defense minister says
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Bolstering Cyprus ' defense capacity is critical for the east Mediterranean island nation so close to the war-wrecked Middle East, the country's defense minister said Tuesday. The priority for Cyprus is to procure better defense systems, said Defense Minister Vasilis Palmas.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: AT&T to eliminate landlines by 2029
item.description: Telecommunications company AT&T has announced plans to eliminate traditional copper wire-based landline phone service across all of its service areas in the United States over the next five years. The statement was made as part of a presentation to investors.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia's stock dips after China opens probe of the AI chip company for violating anti-monopoly laws
item.description: Shares of Nvidia fell Monday after China said it is investigating the high-flying U.S. microchip company over suspected violations of Chinese anti-monopoly laws.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: California to consider requiring mental health warnings on social media sites
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California, home to some of the largest technology companies in the world, would be the first U.S. state to require mental health warning labels on social media sites if lawmakers pass a bill introduced Monday.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, KRON4
